# 2026-03-14 Spring walkthrough

The ledger note. It carries the canonical `source:` identity and the `processed:` stamp, and
it lives in the GRAPH -- never in the source repository, so /process leaves no trace in a
tree someone is actively working in, and the stamp cannot match the file it describes.
